title: Decision: Select and Configure 1Password as Team Secret Manager
description:
Select and configure a team secret management solution. The docs/SECRETS.md document assumes a 1Password vault structure, but this had not been formally confirmed or set up for all team members.

## Decision
Use **1Password** with the following vault structure:
- **DEV vault** — shared development secrets
- **DTP App Prod Vault** — to be created for production secrets

## Setup
- Share the DEV vault with Ryan and Waqar
- Update docs/SECRETS.md with the finalized vault structure
- Ensure Waqar can access the vault for local development
acceptance_criteria: 1Password is confirmed as the team secret manager
DEV vault is shared with both Ryan and Waqar
DTP App Prod Vault is created for production secrets
docs/SECRETS.md is updated with the finalized vault structure
Waqar confirms access to the vault and can see required secrets
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning Phase 1. 1Password selected over alternatives. Production vault to be created separately from the DEV vault.
comment_summary: Ryan asked Waqar to confirm vault access and mark the ticket complete once verified.
